feature: SOP drafter + action_executor — emit/execute adr_status_set kind
rationale: Unblocks HARD RULE #11 routing for ADR lifecycle changes. First non-file_write typed-tool kind — sets the pattern for the other five.

tasks.name: Add artifact_kind variant 'adr_status_flip' alongside existing 'verifiable_path'
tasks.acceptance: OpenCommitment struct + SELECT in fetch_open_commitments accept both kinds; rows with 'adr_status_flip' parse without error

tasks.name: Parse success_artifact 'ADR-<id>:<status>' format into typed struct
tasks.acceptance: helper parse_adr_status_flip returns Result<(adr_id, new_status), ParseErr>; rejects malformed input

phases.name: Drafter branch — emit adr_status_set without LLM

tasks.name: Add draft_adr_status_set path; glob resolve adr_id → canonical filename under docs/adrs/
tasks.acceptance: draft_one matches on artifact_kind; adr_status_flip path calls queue_adr_status_action; no inference HTTP call on this branch

tasks.name: Call proposed_action_open with kind='adr_status_set' + payload {adr_id, adr_file, new_status, reason}
tasks.acceptance: proposed_action row appears with kind=adr_status_set and well-formed payload_json; commitment marks the action as queued

tasks.name: Unit test — fixture commitment produces correct payload, no LLM stub invoked
Add review_adr_status_set; enforce current_status=Proposed, new_status in {Accepted, Abandoned, Superseded}
tasks.acceptance: verdict 'approve' for valid transitions; 'reject' with rationale for invalid (terminal status, missing reason, unknown new_status)

tasks.name: Unit tests — all 6 transition cases (4 reject + 2 approve)
tasks.acceptance: cargo test -p hex-nexus twin_reviewer::tests::adr_status_*  — 6 tests pass

tasks.name: Add execute_adr_status_set; one-line Status replace + dated reason insertion after Date line
tasks.acceptance: ADR file has Status line rewritten + new 'Accepted: <date> — <reason>' line; canonical_root path-traversal guard reused

tasks.name: Wire dispatch arm in execute_one match
tasks.acceptance: match action.kind.as_str() handles 'adr_status_set'; mark_failed only for genuinely unknown kinds

tasks.name: Unit test — fixture ADR with Status: **Proposed** becomes Status: **Accepted** + reason line
tasks.acceptance: cargo test -p hex-nexus action_executor::tests::adr_status_set_mutates_file passes; idempotency check (running twice on Accepted file errors cleanly)

tasks.name: cargo check --workspace — typed types align across drafter/twin/executor
Live SOP test — operator sends board ask, observe proposed_action(adr_status_set) emitted and executed
tasks.acceptance: Test ADR file in docs/adrs/ADR-test-*.md flips from Proposed→Accepted via the full SOP pipeline; proposed_action row reaches status=executed; no operator file edit

tasks.name: Rebuild + deploy hex-nexus; hex dev validate green
tasks.acceptance: hex dev validate exits 0; hex nexus restart picks up new binary; SOP loop runs against new code
